1. Explain what R package dependency management is, why it is necessary
   to write robust code and ensure reproducibility.
2. Use tools like `usethis::use_package()` to manage dependencies in an
   R project and use `::` to explicit use a specific function from a
   specific package in any functions you make.
3. Describe and apply a workflow of prototyping code into a working
   function in a Quarto document, moving the function into a script
   (called, e.g., `functions.R`) once they are robust and tested, and
   then using `source()` to allow easy reuse of functions in other R
   scripts or Quarto documents.
